title: [CR] SCHC codec: MQTT-SN rule uses same address compression as CoAP but different port field
description:
File: rust/lichen-schc/src/codec.rs:432-478

Observation: The MQTT-SN rule (rule 5) duplicates the address compression logic from the CoAP rules. This is correct but could be refactored to share the common address compression/decompression code.

Current code has:
- compress_mqtt_sn: copies address handling from compress_coap
- decompress_mqtt_sn: copies address handling from decompress_coap

Idiomatic improvement: Extract shared address compression helpers to reduce duplication.

Low priority since the code is correct and well-tested.
close_reason: Design observation - SCHC address compression duplication is acceptable; refactoring deferred
